labels.value: Review the errors on this page
AccountNumber must be 16 characters or 19 characters
ApplicationID must be 6 characters or 8 characters or 9 characters

labels.shortDescription: MSG Create Customer History Field Null
labels.value: Value and fieldName must be provided.
DateTime invalid: {0} is not type of Datetime
Email must be one of (randomString1)@(randomString2).(2-5 chars) or (randomString1)@(randomString2).(2-5 chars).(2-5 chars)
PhoneNumber is required for Outbound call
Invalid Type. Must be either OutboundEstablished or InboundRinging
Invalid request: Request body is null
National ID must be 9 characters or 12 characters
Phone number must start with 0 (10 digits) or 84 (11 digits)
TransID is null or no longer than 36 characters
ApplicationID must contain only numeric characters.
Vui lòng nhấn Refresh ở mục Account trong tab Main Info để tải dữ liệu mới nhất
Tải Dữ liệu Không Thành Công
No account linked to this case
{0} must be in format yyyy-MM-dd. Current value: {1}
{0} is not a valid date. Current value: {1}
{0} must be in format yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss. Current value: {1}
{0} is required and cannot be empty.
